rationale: Educ. Code §22.901 prohibits inquiries into religious affiliation in public school employment. It has no relation to homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A person employed or maintained to obtain or aid in obtaining positions for public school employees may not directly or indirectly ask about, orally or in writing, the religion or religious affiliation of anyone applying for employment in the public schools of this state.
_note: Rule text concerns religious-affiliation inquiries in school hiring; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
